title: hieracium marginatum
intro: Hieracium marginatum, also known as the narrow-leaved hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hieracium marginatum include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
